## HistoryQueriesGetters.sessionHistoryQueries property

A list of the queries that have been made in the last period of time specified by [HistoryQueriesConfig.sessionTTLInMs](./x-components.historyqueriesconfig.sessionttlinms.md)<!-- -->.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
sessionHistoryQueries: HistoryQuery[];
```
